question.label: Team connection
question.name: How connected do you feel to the rest of the team right now?
question.description: Probes isolation or drift without naming it; one of the earliest signals of disengagement.

answer: I have been less present in rituals, yes.

assessment.note: Less present in rituals signals a mild drop in engagement and connection, with no new clarity or growth signal.

new_queue.label: Rituals since then
new_queue.name: I've noticed you've been quieter in a few team rituals since the promotion decision — what's changed there?

new_queue.label: What landed
new_queue.name: What part of the feedback from that decision actually landed with you?

new_queue.label: Unsaid reaction
new_queue.name: What did you choose not to say after that decision?

new_queue.label: Next-step picture
new_queue.name: What concrete path forward feels real to you right now?

new_queue.label: Mentoring shape
new_queue.name: What is the mentoring program taking space for in your week?

new_queue.label: Core path tradeoff
new_queue.name: What are you choosing not to spend time on because of the mentoring program?

new_queue.label: Support needed
new_queue.name: What would help make the next couple of weeks steadier for you?

history.answer_excerpt: I have been less present in rituals, yes.
I have been less present in rituals, yes.
